category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Nigeria SONCAP and NIS (IEC-adopted) requirements.

title.en: China-to-Nigeria Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入尼日利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入奈及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Nigeria's mandatory SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme), NIS IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard, energy-efficiency labelling/MEPS, R-600a refrigerant handling, and in-country importer requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与尼日利亚强制性SONCAP（尼日利亚标准组织符合性评定计划）、NIS IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、能效标签/最低能效标准（MEPS）、R-600a制冷剂处理及境内进口商要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與奈及利亞強制性SONCAP（奈及利亞標準組織符合性評定計畫）、NIS IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、能效標籤/最低能效標準（MEPS）、R-600a製冷劑處理及境內進口商要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Nigerian legislation, SON standards, SONCAP procedures, energy-efficiency thresholds, and importer/registration requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、符合性评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行尼日利亚法律、SON标准、SONCAP程序、能效门槛值及进口商/注册要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、符合性評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行奈及利亞法律、SON標準、SONCAP程序、能效門檻值及進口商/註冊要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Nigeria compliance gaps: (1) mandatory SONCAP certification — every shipment requires a Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate issued before clearance at Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne; CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted as a substitute. (2) Electrical safety must be demonstrated to NIS IEC 60335-2-24 (Nigeria adopts IEC standards as NIS) at 230 V 50 Hz nominal — China's 220/380 V supply differs even though both are 50 Hz. (3) Energy-efficiency labelling/MEPS compliance for refrigerating appliances. (4) Appointment of an in-country Nigerian importer/consignee is required to clear goods and hold certification. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大尼日利亚合规差距：（1）强制性SONCAP认证——每批货物在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奥内清关前，须取得产品证书及每批货的SONCAP证书；CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受为替代。（2）电气安全须按NIS IEC 60335-2-24（尼日利亚将IEC标准采纳为NIS）在230伏50赫兹标称电压下证明——中国220/380伏供电虽同为50赫兹但电压不同。（3）制冷器具的能效标签/最低能效标准（MEPS）合规。（4）须委任尼日利亚境内进口商/收货人以清关并持有认证。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大奈及利亞合規差距：（1）強制性SONCAP認證——每批貨物在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奧內清關前，須取得產品證書及每批貨的SONCAP證書；CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受為替代。（2）電氣安全須按NIS IEC 60335-2-24（奈及利亞將IEC標準採納為NIS）在230伏50赫茲標稱電壓下證明——中國220/380伏供電雖同為50赫茲但電壓不同。（3）製冷器具的能效標籤/最低能效標準（MEPS）合規。（4）須委任奈及利亞境內進口商/收貨人以清關並持有認證。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official SON / SONCAP, regulator, standards body, or primary legal sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
